title: selaginella densa var. standleyi
intro: Selaginella densa var. standleyi, also known as the 'Mexican Fire' or 'False Fern', is a type of spore-producing plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selaginella densa var. standleyi include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
